en.description_en: This pedestal together with mitsuwadama (three-ring) beads is archaeological material in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is village-designated by Tokai Village and was designated on 1984-02-25. It is held at 768-38 in Tokai Village.

This warrior (bujin) haniwa figure is archaeological material in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is village-designated by Tokai Village and was designated on 1984-03-19. It is held at 768-38 in Tokai Village.

This dogu (clay figurine) is archaeological material in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is village-designated by Tokai Village and was designated on 1984-03-19. It is held at 768-38 in Tokai Village.

en.name_en: Artifacts Excavated from the Saiyu Site
en.description_en: These artifacts excavated from the Saiyu site are archaeological material in the Tangible Cultural Property category. They are village-designated by Tokai Village and were designated on 2006-07-11. They are held at 768-38 in Tokai Village.

This male haniwa figure wearing a hairpin (kogai) is archaeological material in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is village-designated by Tokai Village and was designated on 2022-08-30. It is held at 768-38 in Tokai Village.

This land-division map of Taketomo is an old document in the Tangible Cultural Property category. It is village-designated by Tokai Village and was designated on 2022-08-30. It is held in a private residence.
